lede: A growing list of projects from class and outside of it. Some are finished, some are in progress, some are abandoned in interesting ways.

items.title: This website
items.description: A personal site built by hand. HTML, CSS, GSAP scroll animations, and a deliberate refusal to use a heavy framework.

items.title: Reading log
items.description: A public archive of what I'm reading - books, papers, the occasional long article - and what I think about each one.

items.title: Course notes
items.description: Edited notes from my favorite classes, published at the end of each semester. The goal: make them useful to someone other than me.

items.title: Research project name
items.description: One-paragraph description of what you're researching, the question driving it, and where it stands. Replace this with a real project as you go.

items.title: A small thing I built
items.description: Placeholder for a side project: a script, a tool, a small piece of software you wrote because you wanted it to exist. Add a link if it's online.

items.title: Something next
items.description: You'll have more projects soon. For now this is a placeholder so the grid looks complete. Replace it (or delete the card) when you're ready.
